mapper.sql: FROM favorites f JOIN products p ON p.id = f.product_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pc.product_id, SUM(pc.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM purchases pc GROUP BY pc.product_id ) purchase_stat ON purchase_stat.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.product_id, MIN(hp.hot_deal_price) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price ASC, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100) DESC NULLS LAST, hp.product_option_id ASC ) AS sale_price, MIN(FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100)) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY hp.hot_deal_price ASC, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / NULLIF(hp.original_price, 0) * 100) DESC NULLS LAST, hp.product_option_id ASC ) AS discount_rate FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at GROUP BY po.product_id ) deal_stat ON deal_stat.product_id = p.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.price AS price, deal_stat.sale_price AS salePrice, NVL(deal_stat.discount_rate, 0) AS discountRate, p.view_count AS viewCount, NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) AS totalQuantity, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, f.created_at AS favoriteCreatedAt
ORDER BY NVL(purchase_stat.total_quantity, 0) DESC, p.view_count DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) ASC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY NVL(deal_stat.sale_price, p.price) DESC, p.id ASC
ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites ( user_id, product_id, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
